name: memoryai-vsx
description: One brain. Every AI you use. Forever. Shared long-term memory for Claude, Cursor, AI assistant, and any IDE that follows.

memoryai.endpoint.description: MemoryAI API endpoint. Use http://localhost:8420 for self-hosted.

memoryai.compactAtTokens.description: Soft warning threshold in tokens. Used as fallback when compactPct is unset or model context window is unknown. Must be less than memoryai.criticalAtTokens.

memoryai.criticalAtTokens.description: Hard ceiling in tokens. Used as fallback when criticalPct is unset.

memoryai.compactPct.description: Soft warning at this fraction of the model's context window (0.30 = 30%). Recommended over absolute tokens — works for any context size (200K Sonnet vs 1M Opus). Must be less than criticalPct.

memoryai.criticalPct.description: Hard ceiling at this fraction of the model's context window (0.50 = 50%). Forces a compact at this point.

memoryai.hardCap.description: Deprecated — use compactAtTokens / criticalAtTokens. Kept for one minor cycle.
memoryai.hardCap.markdownDeprecationMessage: `memoryai.hardCap` has been replaced by `memoryai.compactAtTokens` and `memoryai.criticalAtTokens`. Update your settings.

memoryai.privateMode.description: Local-only mode for NDA / regulated data. Reserved for a future release.

memoryai.statusBar.description: Status-bar display format. full = brain size + monthly activity + savings (recommended). savings = $ saved today only. tokens = brain volume only. compact = monthly activity only. off = hide.
enumDescriptions: Brain volume — total memories and storage.
This month's activity — stores and recalls.
